**Target URL:** https://app.vwo.com/  
**Framework:** Playwright + TypeScript | Page Object Model  
**Generated by:** STLC Agent — VWO Testing Pipeline

---

## playwright.config.ts

```typescript
import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';

export default defineConfig({
  testDir: './tests',
  timeout: 30_000,
  expect: { timeout: 5_000 },
  fullyParallel: false, // login tests must run independently
  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
  workers: process.env.CI ? 2 : 1,
  reporter: [['html', { open: 'never' }], ['list']],

  use: {
    baseURL: 'https://app.vwo.com',
    headless: true,
    screenshot: 'only-on-failure',
    video: 'retain-on-failure',
    trace: 'on-first-retry',
  },

  projects: [
    {
      name: 'chromium',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Chrome'] },
    },
    {
      name: 'firefox',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Firefox'] },
    },
    {
      name: 'edge',
      use: { ...devices['Desktop Edge'], channel: 'msedge' },
    },
  ],
});
```

---

## pages/LoginPage.ts

```typescript
import { Page, Locator, expect } from '@playwright/test';

export class LoginPage {
  readonly page: Page;
  readonly emailInput: Locator;
  readonly passwordInput: Locator;
  readonly loginButton: Locator;
  readonly errorMessage: Locator;
  readonly forgotPasswordLink: Locator;
  readonly rememberMeCheckbox: Locator;

  constructor(page: Page) {
    this.page = page;
    this.emailInput        = page.locator('input[type="email"], input[name="email"], input[placeholder*="email" i]').first();
    this.passwordInput     = page.locator('input[type="password"]').first();
    this.loginButton       = page.locator('button[type="submit"], button:has-text("Log in"), button:has-text("Login")').first();
    this.errorMessage      = page.locator('[class*="error"], [class*="alert"], [role="alert"], .notification--error').first();
    this.forgotPasswordLink = page.locator('a:has-text("Forgot"), a:has-text("forgot"), a[href*="forgot"]').first();
    this.rememberMeCheckbox = page.locator('input[type="checkbox"][name*="remember"], label:has-text("Remember")').first();
  }

  async goto(): Promise<void> {
    await this.page.goto('/');
    await this.page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');
  }

  async fillEmail(email: string): Promise<void> {
    await this.emailInput.fill(email);
  }

  async fillPassword(password: string): Promise<void> {
    await this.passwordInput.fill(password);
  }

  async clickLogin(): Promise<void> {
    await this.loginButton.click();
  }

  /** Convenience helper: fill both fields and submit */
  async login(email: string, password: string): Promise<void> {
    await this.fillEmail(email);
    await this.fillPassword(password);
    await this.clickLogin();
  }

  async getErrorMessage(): Promise<string> {
    await this.errorMessage.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 5_000 });
    return (await this.errorMessage.textContent()) ?? '';
  }

  async clickForgotPassword(): Promise<void> {
    await this.forgotPasswordLink.click();
  }

  async isLoginButtonEnabled(): Promise<boolean> {
    return this.loginButton.isEnabled();
  }

  async submitWithEnterKey(): Promise<void> {
    await this.passwordInput.press('Enter');
  }
}
```

---

## pages/DashboardPage.ts

```typescript
import { Page, Locator } from '@playwright/test';

export class DashboardPage {
  readonly page: Page;
  readonly navMenu: Locator;
  readonly userMenu: Locator;
  readonly vwoLogo: Locator;

  constructor(page: Page) {
    this.page = page;
    // Selectors are intentionally broad — adjust to match real DOM after inspecting the app
    this.navMenu  = page.locator('nav, [class*="sidebar"], [class*="navigation"], [role="navigation"]').first();
    this.userMenu = page.locator('[class*="user-menu"], [class*="avatar"], [class*="profile"], [aria-label*="account" i], [aria-label*="user" i]').first();
    this.vwoLogo  = page.locator('img[alt*="VWO" i], img[src*="logo"], [class*="logo"]').first();
  }

  async isLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {
    await this.page.waitForLoadState('networkidle', { timeout: 15_000 });
    const url = this.page.url();
    return !url.includes('/login') && !url.includes('/signin');
  }

  async getPageTitle(): Promise<string> {
    return this.page.title();
  }

  async isNavMenuVisible(): Promise<boolean> {
    return this.navMenu.isVisible();
  }

  async isUserMenuVisible(): Promise<boolean> {
    return this.userMenu.isVisible();
  }

  async isLogoVisible(): Promise<boolean> {
    return this.vwoLogo.isVisible();
  }
}
```

## tests/login.spec.ts

```typescript
import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
import { LoginPage } from '../pages/LoginPage';
import { DashboardPage } from '../pages/DashboardPage';

const VALID_EMAIL    = process.env.VWO_TEST_EMAIL    ?? 'test@vwo.com';
const VALID_PASSWORD = process.env.VWO_TEST_PASSWORD ?? 'TestPass@123';

test.describe('VWO Login Page', () => {

  test.beforeEach(async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    await loginPage.goto();
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  HAPPY PATH
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-001 */
  test('valid credentials redirect to Dashboard', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage     = new LoginPage(page);
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    await loginPage.login(VALID_EMAIL, VALID_PASSWORD);

    await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/login|signin/, { timeout: 10_000 });
    expect(await dashboardPage.isLoaded()).toBe(true);
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  NEGATIVE — INVALID CREDENTIALS
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-002 */
  test('invalid email format shows error message', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.login('notanemail', VALID_PASSWORD);

    const errorText = await loginPage.getErrorMessage();
    expect(errorText.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/login|signin|app\.vwo\.com\/?$/);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-003 */
  test('email missing domain shows error', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.login('test@', VALID_PASSWORD);

    const errorText = await loginPage.getErrorMessage();
    expect(errorText.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-004 */
  test('wrong password shows error message', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.login(VALID_EMAIL, 'WrongPassword999!');

    const errorText = await loginPage.getErrorMessage();
    expect(errorText.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/login|signin|app\.vwo\.com\/?$/);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-005 */
  test('unregistered email shows generic error', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.login('notregistered_xyz999@example.com', VALID_PASSWORD);

    const errorText = await loginPage.getErrorMessage();
    expect(errorText.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    // Must NOT leak whether email exists (security requirement)
    expect(errorText.toLowerCase()).not.toMatch(/email.*not.*found|no.*account.*email/);
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  FIELD VALIDATION — EMPTY FIELDS
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-006 */
  test('empty email field is validated before submission', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.fillPassword(VALID_PASSWORD);
    await loginPage.clickLogin();

    // Either validation message appears OR login button is disabled
    const emailInvalid = await loginPage.emailInput.evaluate(
      (el) => !(el as HTMLInputElement).validity.valid
    );
    const errorVisible = await loginPage.errorMessage.isVisible().catch(() => false);

    expect(emailInvalid || errorVisible).toBe(true);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-007 */
  test('empty password field is validated before submission', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.fillEmail(VALID_EMAIL);
    await loginPage.clickLogin();

    const pwInvalid = await loginPage.passwordInput.evaluate(
      (el) => !(el as HTMLInputElement).validity.valid
    );
    const errorVisible = await loginPage.errorMessage.isVisible().catch(() => false);

    expect(pwInvalid || errorVisible).toBe(true);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-008 */
  test('both fields empty prevents login', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.clickLogin();

    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/login|signin|app\.vwo\.com\/?$/);
    // Confirm user stays on the login page
    await expect(loginPage.loginButton).toBeVisible();
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  SECURITY
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-009 */
  test('SQL injection in email field does not bypass auth', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.login("' OR '1'='1", VALID_PASSWORD);

    // Must NOT reach dashboard
    await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/dashboard/, { timeout: 5_000 });
    // Must NOT expose a server/DB error
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').textContent();
    expect(bodyText ?? '').not.toMatch(/sql|syntax error|ORA-|mysql_fetch/i);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-010 */
  test('XSS payload in email field is sanitized — no script execution', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    // Listen for unexpected dialog (alert from XSS)
    let xssTriggered = false;
    page.on('dialog', async (dialog) => {
      xssTriggered = true;
      await dialog.dismiss();
    });

    await loginPage.login("<script>alert('xss')</script>", VALID_PASSWORD);

    expect(xssTriggered).toBe(false);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-011 */
  test('password field masks input characters', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.fillPassword(VALID_PASSWORD);

    const inputType = await loginPage.passwordInput.getAttribute('type');
    expect(inputType).toBe('password');
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  UX / KEYBOARD
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-012 */
  test('pressing Enter key on password field submits login form', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage     = new LoginPage(page);
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    await loginPage.fillEmail(VALID_EMAIL);
    await loginPage.fillPassword(VALID_PASSWORD);
    await loginPage.submitWithEnterKey();

    await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/login|signin/, { timeout: 10_000 });
    expect(await dashboardPage.isLoaded()).toBe(true);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-013 */
  test('Forgot Password link navigates to password-reset page', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.clickForgotPassword();

    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');
    const url = page.url();
    // Should navigate away from the main login to a reset/forgot-password URL
    expect(url).toMatch(/forgot|reset|password/i);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-014 */
  test('tab key navigates from email to password to login button', async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);

    await loginPage.emailInput.focus();
    await page.keyboard.press('Tab');
    await expect(loginPage.passwordInput).toBeFocused();

    await page.keyboard.press('Tab');
    await expect(loginPage.loginButton).toBeFocused();
  });

});
```

---

## tests/dashboard.spec.ts

```typescript
import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
import { LoginPage } from '../pages/LoginPage';
import { DashboardPage } from '../pages/DashboardPage';

const VALID_EMAIL    = process.env.VWO_TEST_EMAIL    ?? 'test@vwo.com';
const VALID_PASSWORD = process.env.VWO_TEST_PASSWORD ?? 'TestPass@123';

test.describe('VWO Dashboard', () => {

  // Log in once before each dashboard test
  test.beforeEach(async ({ page }) => {
    const loginPage = new LoginPage(page);
    await loginPage.goto();
    await loginPage.login(VALID_EMAIL, VALID_PASSWORD);
    // Wait until redirected away from login
    await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/login|signin/, { timeout: 15_000 });
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  DASHBOARD LOAD & CONTENT
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-DASH-001 */
  test('dashboard page loads with correct URL and title after login', async ({ page }) => {
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    expect(await dashboardPage.isLoaded()).toBe(true);

    const title = await dashboardPage.getPageTitle();
    expect(title.toLowerCase()).toMatch(/vwo|dashboard/);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-DASH-002 */
  test('main navigation menu is visible on dashboard', async ({ page }) => {
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    expect(await dashboardPage.isNavMenuVisible()).toBe(true);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-DASH-003 */
  test('user profile / account menu is visible on dashboard', async ({ page }) => {
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    expect(await dashboardPage.isUserMenuVisible()).toBe(true);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-DASH-004 */
  test('VWO logo and branding is visible on dashboard', async ({ page }) => {
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    expect(await dashboardPage.isLogoVisible()).toBe(true);
  });

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  //  SESSION
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /* TC-VWO-DASH-005 */
  test('session persists after page refresh', async ({ page }) => {
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    await page.reload({ waitUntil: 'networkidle' });

    expect(await dashboardPage.isLoaded()).toBe(true);
    await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/login|signin/);
  });

  /* TC-VWO-DASH-006 */
  test('logout redirects to login page and back button does not re-enter', async ({ page }) => {
    const dashboardPage = new DashboardPage(page);

    // Click user menu → Logout
    await dashboardPage.userMenu.click();
    const logoutLink = page.locator('a:has-text("Logout"), a:has-text("Log out"), button:has-text("Logout")').first();
    await logoutLink.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 5_000 });
    await logoutLink.click();

    // Should be on login page
    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/login|signin|app\.vwo\.com\/?$/, { timeout: 10_000 });

    // Press browser back button
    await page.goBack();
    await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');

    // Should still be on login (session invalidated)
    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/login|signin|app\.vwo\.com\/?$/);
  });

});
```

---

## Usage

### Prerequisites

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install @playwright/test
npx playwright install chromium firefox msedge

# Set test credentials as environment variables
export VWO_TEST_EMAIL="your_qa_email@example.com"
export VWO_TEST_PASSWORD="your_qa_password"
```

### Run All Tests

```bash
npx playwright test
```

### Run Only Login Tests

```bash
npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts
```

### Run Only Dashboard Tests

```bash
npx playwright test tests/dashboard.spec.ts
```

### Run on Specific Browser

```bash
npx playwright test --project=chromium
npx playwright test --project=firefox
```

### View HTML Report

```bash
npx playwright show-report
```
